query: The washer cycle is almost done so I want to lower humidity and get air moving before I move the clothes to prevent mustiness. At 1:36 PM, which is 20 minutes before washer 2 in the utility room finishes, turn on dehumidifier 1 in the kitchen to a gentle low setting and turn on fan 1 in the living room to a steady medium breeze.
